title: Cobblemania
description: This datapack-mod adds many new Fakemons for the Cobblemon mod!
body:
![titlecobble](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75d3e3c23e7bb5d05cd00b11eeb43b3603570321.png) ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1761a752727c7c0ee48e6c1c1831cb482b325f66.png)

Welcome In Cobblemania World!

**This is the big new addon for the Cobblemon mod! This new addon will add fakemon regions, new mechanics, mega evolutions, new gimmicks, held items and much more!** We have permission to use from all regions Currently Regions : - [Impetia Region](https://www.instagram.com/cioxmon/) - [Ikaku Region](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tISxhl1wZdTG0pQc54jE1I3hlyEvd5lvO2Nhv26aGB8/edit?gid=209544946#gid=209544946) - [Mazah Region](https://www.deviantart.com/subjectively5) - [Amber and Chrome Regions](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1QKyHrYdA3zxhYTzsHWf9spSqErzxnkynnJlO79GtJkY/edit?gid=378643774#gid=378643774) - [Aroma and Ozera Regions](https://www.instagram.com/artworks218_/) ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1761a752727c7c0ee48e6c1c1831cb482b325f66.png)

New Features from Cobblemania!

- NEW TYPES - Air, Light, Sound! - New Fossils! You can also find them in Cobblemon's fossil structures and new Cobblemania's fossil structures. - MEGA EVOLUTIONS! Now you can mega evolve your fakemons in battle and not only. - New Pokeballs. - New Moves and Abilities! Teach your Fakemons new moves! - New *Fossil Structures* and *Meteorite* structures! You can find a new fossils in the structures! And the meteorite will contain a keystone and various mega stones... ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1761a752727c7c0ee48e6c1c1831cb482b325f66.png)

New Two fossils!

![Fossils](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dc6424a396af4ff011a1793009b7b5bfbd7748f.png)
